column3: Notes
column8: What does this number mean?

column3: Counts total elixirs brewed across the match; one-time milestone bonus at 50 applies to all Alchemists on field
column8: Accumulated elixirs brewed; L branch: each gives +0.25% attack speed to all Alchemists + one-time +30% buff at 50; R branch: each gives +0.3% damage + one-time +40% buff at 50

column3: L branch: 1.5% damage per flower up to 50 then 0.75%; R branch: 2% per flower up to 50 then 0.5%; threshold is same for both branches
column8: Dance flower/charge count; each charge adds damage buff to Blade Dancer; value above 50 still increases but with diminishing returns

column3: R branch High Arcanist only — charge counter appears on Arcanist tile not regular mage tile
column8: Arcanist attack charge count; each charge contributes to stacking damage bonus; after 500 charges each additional charge grants +0.4% damage though critical damage is reduced 3x

column3: Soul counter is present regardless of talent branch; L: at 20 souls Cultist transforms to Harbinger (+15% attack speed); R: every 5 souls summons a guardian demon
column8: Soul count; each soul permanently increases Cultist damage by 2%; significant power spike at 20 (L: Harbinger transform) or every 5 (R: guardian summon)

column3: L branch Absorption of Evil — marks accumulate on Hunters; 90 mark threshold
column8: Mark count on Hunter; each mark adds +6% damage up to 90 marks; after 90 each additional mark adds +1% — significant dropoff at 90

column3: R branch Twilight Hunting — Twilight Hunter form; different threshold from L branch at 60 marks
column8: Mark count (Twilight Hunter form); each mark adds +4.2% damage up to 60 marks; after 60 each additional mark adds +1%

column3: Bolt counter on Stein; only active with tier 4 Fixed talent (Steininator); bolts sent from kills on opponent field
column8: Bolt count received by Stein; at 60 bolts: crit damage +4% and movement-induced crit +100%; at 100 bolts: Stein gains final form +50% damage

column3: R branch tier 4 Magic Knockout only; charges accumulate from Mana Power-up uses since Mana Power-ups can be used twice with this talent
column8: Magic charge count; at 100 charges: Magic Fists deal additional damage equal to 5% of target current HP; at 200 charges: +5% critical attack chance

column3: L and R branches share the same threshold of 30; L boosts entire row; R boosts direct neighbors; charge mechanic is core to both builds
column8: Bonus damage charge count; L branch: +1.2% damage to all units in same row per charge up to 30 then +0.3%; R branch: +1.2% to neighbors per charge up to 30 then +0.3%

column3: Fury charge counter present for both L and R branches; L: +0.5% per charge; R: +0.75% per charge; both drop to +0.25% after 300
column8: Fury charge count accumulated from merges and rank increases; L branch: +0.5% extra damage per Fury charge up to 300 then +0.25%; R branch: +0.75% up to 300 then +0.25%

column3: L branch Ghostly Reaper only — trophy skull counter from instant kills; R branch does not use this counter
column8: Trophy skull count from instant kills; each skull +2% damage inflicted by all Reapers on field up to 150 trophies; after 150 each gives only +0.3%

column3: R branch Alpha Wolf only — makes charge counter shared across all Riding Hoods on field; ability milestones at 1 5 20 and 40 charges
column8: Shared wolf charge count across all Riding Hoods; +1.5% damage per charge up to 40; after 40 each charge gives +0.5%; new abilities unlock at 1 5 20 and 40

column3: Soul counter applies to both L and R branches; both get major buff at 50; tier 4 Crown of Darkness adds a second threshold at 150
column8: Soul count; at 50 souls: major buff triggered (L: +70% attack speed + 2% instant kill chance; R: Magical Shot damage +200%); at 150 souls: +4% crit chance + 30% Magical Shot damage

column3: Feat Charge counter present for both branches; L milestone at 30 activates Clone Army; R branch every 7 charges grants genuine Wukong a merge rank
column8: Feat Charge count; milestone at 30 triggers Clone Army (max clones increases to 6 and they are summoned); R branch: every 7 charges genuine Wukong gains a merge rank

column3: L T1 Awakening Rage — Clover counter on Bruiser tile; a Clover is 4 leaves; leaves given by merges and rank-ups nearby; threshold at 50 Clovers
column8: Whole Clover count on Bruiser tile; each Clover +23% enraged damage up to 50 Clovers; after 50 bonus reduced to +10% per Clover

column3: R T1 Furious Brotherhood — Clover counter shared across all Bruisers; merging or absorbing a Bruiser gives leaves to 3 random Bruisers; threshold at 40 Clovers
column8: Whole Clover count on Bruiser tile; each Clover +10% enraged damage to all Bruisers up to 40 Clovers; after 40 bonus reduced to +2% per Clover

column3: Card counter present for both L and R T1 branches; counter cycles 0 to 5 then resets when exchanged for mana; R T2 Masterful Performance has 40% chance to grant an extra card per copy
column8: Playing card count; cycles from 0 to 5 — at 5 cards the Harlequin exchanges all for mana equal to 100% of summoning cost and counter resets; higher count means mana reward is closer

column3: L T1 Hunting Season only — trophy counter on Hunter tile; each trophy increases summoned boar health rather than Hunter damage; no explicit threshold
column8: Trophy count from boss and mini-boss kills (8% chance vs common monsters); each trophy increases boar health sent to opponent by 4%; no documented diminishing-return threshold — treated as linear

column3: R T1 Large Prey only — trophy counter on individual Hunter tile; threshold at 60 trophies sharp dropoff
column8: Trophy count per individual Hunter; each trophy +4% damage to this Hunter up to 60 trophies; after 60 trophies bonus drops to +0.5% per trophy

column3: L T1 Knight of Light only — boss kill counter on Knight of Light tile; each boss kill +3.5% damage to Knights; no explicit threshold listed
column8: Boss kill count on Knight of Light tile; each boss or mini-boss kill +3.5% damage to all active Knights of Light; no diminishing-return threshold in description — treated as linear

column3: R T1 Knight of Darkness only — rank absorption counter on Knight of Darkness tile; Knight steals rank from other Inquisitors every 12s; threshold at 30 absorptions
column8: Rank absorption count on Knight of Darkness tile; each absorbed rank +6% damage to Knight up to 30 absorptions; after 30 absorptions bonus reduced to +3% per absorption

column3: L T1 Blessing only — Orb of Power counter on each Monk tile; orbs transferred to intersection Monk on merge/absorb; no explicit damage threshold in description
column8: Orb of Power count per individual Monk tile; each orb +6% damage to that Monk; orbs transfer to intersection Monk on merge or absorb; no documented diminishing-return threshold

column3: R T1 Equilibrium — cumulative balance sphere trigger count; sphere appears on one random Monk at a time; threshold at 50 triggers where per-trigger bonus drops sharply
column8: Cumulative balance sphere trigger count (merges and rank-ups while sphere is active); each trigger +9% damage to all Monks up to 50 triggers; after 50 triggers bonus reduced to +2% per trigger

column3: L T3 Gift of Ancestors — spirit counter on Oracle/Summoner tile; spirits accumulate from Oracle merges; hard cap at 40; milestone at 10 enables activation via replacement; T4 Fixed adds crit effects per 2 spirits
column8: Spirit count on Oracle tile; each spirit extends the all-unit damage bonus duration by 0.5s per spirit when Summoner summons; milestone at 10 spirits enables bonus trigger via replacements; hard cap 40

column3: R T1 Professor — charge counter on Professor tile; Professor appears when any Tesla merges with R branch; retains charges across deaths; no hard limit; threshold at 68 charges very sharp
column8: Professor charge count; each charge +0.48% damage to all Teslas scaled by Professor merge rank up to 68 charges; after 68 bonus drops to +0.05% per charge

column3: L T1 Arboreal Guard — leaf counter on each rank 4+ Treant tile; leaves accumulated from Mana Power-up and Spiny Roots procs; threshold at 30 leaves
column8: Leaf count per rank 4+ Treant tile; each leaf +7.8% damage to that Treant; after 30 leaves bonus reduced to +3.9% per leaf (rate halved)

column3: R T1 Mycelium Masters — leaf counter on each rank 4+ Treant tile; leaves boost all Treant damage not just the holder; threshold at 70 leaves
column8: Leaf count per rank 4+ Treant tile; each leaf +1.5% damage to all Treants on field; after 70 leaves bonus reduced to +0.75% per leaf (rate halved)

column3: L T1 Fury of the Fallen — rune counter shared across all Valkyries; earned from Chosen One losses; threshold at 70 runes major power spike; T4 Fixed adds threshold at 150
column8: Rune count accumulated from Chosen One losses and kills; at 70 runes attack speed bonus doubles to 20% and damage +50%; T4 Fixed: at 150 runes all Valkyries +5% critical damage chance

column3: R T1 Power of the Leaders — rune counter on Leader Valkyrie tiles; runes earned via Mana Power-up; Chosen One grants 2x runes; T4 Fixed threshold at 150 runes
column8: Rune count on Leader Valkyrie tiles; Leaders gain increased damage from rune accumulation; T4 Fixed: after 150 runes all Valkyries +5% critical damage chance

column3: Inspiration counter shared across all Bards; R T1 Drummer: additional Accordionists unlock at levels 75 150 and 300; T4 Fixed Cacophony activates at 300; L branch gains Inspiration more slowly in Drummer mode
column8: Inspiration level (cumulative); R branch: each milestone (75/150/300) unlocks additional Accordionists; T4 Fixed: at 300 Inspiration Bard has 4% chance to fire damage clump on attack; higher Inspiration = more active Accordionists and T4 eligibility

column3: R T1 Desperado only — Shootout charge counter on Gunslinger tile; gained by moving a rank 2+ Gunslinger to a special tile (unit loses 1 rank and gains rank*2 charges); charges are permanent and accumulate
column8: Shootout charge count; each charge +1% damage from basic attacks in Shootout mode; charges accumulate whenever a Gunslinger is sacrificed to a special tile; no documented diminishing-return threshold — treated as linear

column3: R T1 Fiery Bolide only — magma charge counter on Meteor tile (Meteor with Flame Orb); gained from monsters killed by the Bolide; bosses and mini-bosses grant x5 charges; hard cap at 700
column8: Magma charge count on Meteor tile; each charge +2.2% damage to this Meteor and +1.5% damage to the Meteorite; hard cap at 700 charges after which no further charges accumulate

column3: Flame Particle counter present for both L and R branches; L: at 100 particles critical damage +20%; R: at 100 particles critical damage +35%; T4 Fixed: at 300 particles critical damage chance +5%
column8: Flame Particle count; milestone at 100 triggers branch-specific crit damage bonus (L: +20% R: +35%); T4 Fixed: milestone at 300 grants +5% critical damage chance to all Phoenixes; particles gained from active state entries immolations and Charges of Awakening

column3: Parts counter visible on Robot tile; both L and R T1 branches unlock a major upgrade at 14 Parts; T4 Fixed BRG-1000 unlocks at 20 Parts; Parts accumulate from upgrades triggered by merges
column8: Parts count; milestone at 14 Parts unlocks upgrade: +5% crit chance and +25% damage (L) or +5% crit chance (R); milestone at 20 Parts (T4 Fixed) unlocks laser attack with 400%/800% damage vs common/boss monsters

column3: R T1 Change of Guard only — cumulative Guard Post placement count; each new Sentry on a Guard Post gives +20% Enhanced Bolt damage; bonus drops sharply to +2% after 9 placements
column8: Cumulative Guard Post placement count; each placement +20% Enhanced Bolt damage up to 9 placements; after 9 placements bonus drops to +2% per additional placement; Guard Post tiles rotate every 15s

column3: R T3 Piety only — relic counter on Zealot tile; relics earned when Zealot receives mana on a neighboring tile (35% chance per event); hard cap at 100 relics
column8: Relic of righteousness count; each relic +3 damage points to this Zealot (flat damage); hard cap at 100 relics after which no further relics can be collected

column3: R T3 Magical Pact — cumulative field damage stack; only increments on Dark Orb Demonologist merges; each qualifying merge +1.5% field damage to all units; hard cap at 90% (requires ~60 Dark Orb merges); displayed as a percentage on the tile
column8: Cumulative field damage bonus from Dark Orb Demonologist merges; each qualifying merge adds +1.5% damage to all units on the field; hard cap at 90% after which additional Dark Orb merges no longer increase the bonus

column3: Treasure counter tracked in dedicated treasure UI panel; L T1: at 20 treasure a second opponent unit is paralyzed by ghost; T2 L: treasure above max converts to +3% permanent damage per Sea Dog tile; max treasure grows +10 per talent tier
column8: Treasure count; L T1 milestone at 20 treasure adds second ghost paralysis target; T2 L: overflow treasure grants +3% permanent damage to the Sea Dog that received it; higher treasure count = more paralysis targets and damage conversion from overflow

column3: T4 Fixed Cursed Amulet only — amulet piece counter (0 to 4 hard cap); each piece has 10% chance to be buried alongside treasure finds; at 4 pieces the strongest Sea Dog summons a frigate every 20s
column8: Amulet piece count (0-4 hard cap); each piece +5% damage to all Sea Dogs; at 4 pieces the strongest Sea Dog summons a frigate every 20s dealing 500% damage per cannonball; every piece is high-value due to the hard cap

column3: Particle counter fundamental to both L and R branches; L T1: 1 particle per 2 ranks gained from merging; T2 L: +1 particle per different-color merge; R T1: particles from Mana Power-up during balance equal to number of color pairs; T4 Fixed: at 100 charges critical chance bonus doubles
column8: Particle (charge) count accumulated through merging and balance events; particles power armor-reduction stacking during balance and build toward T4 Fixed milestone; at 100 charges the balance-state critical chance bonus doubles from 2.5% to 5%

column3: Bottom-panel rank sum; more Alchemists at higher ranks = faster collective elixir brewing; all Alchemist elixir counts are shared so total investment drives how quickly the shared milestones are reached
column8: Sum of merge ranks across all Alchemist copies on board (e.g. 3x rank 3 = 9); higher total investment = faster collective elixir accumulation toward the shared 50-elixir milestone

column3: Bottom-panel rank sum; chain bonus maxes at 6 Banshees on field regardless of rank — rank sum is a proxy for how close the player is to a maxed chain
column8: Sum of merge ranks across all Banshee copies on board; damage in chain increases 18% per Banshee up to 6 Banshees; beyond 6 the chain bonus is maxed — rank sum above ~6 means some Banshees are high-ranked which amplifies base damage

column3: Bottom-panel rank sum; each Blade Dancer individually accumulates flower charges — more Blade Dancers on board = more tiles collecting charges simultaneously
column8: Sum of merge ranks across all Blade Dancer copies on board; higher total investment means more Blade Dancers actively accumulating charges toward the 50-flower threshold

column3: Bottom-panel rank sum; Clover leaves are generated by nearby merges and rank-ups — more Bruisers and higher-ranked ones increase field presence and Clover generation rate
column8: Sum of merge ranks across all Bruiser copies on board; higher total investment = more Bruisers on field generating and receiving Clover leaves; Ringleader (T4 Fixed) appears automatically when Bruisers are present

column3: Bottom-panel rank sum; each Cultist independently accumulates souls — more Cultists = more soul generation and more units reaching the 20-soul Harbinger or 5-soul guardian thresholds
column8: Sum of merge ranks across all Cultist copies on board; more total investment = more simultaneous soul accumulators; multiple Cultists each independently building soul counts amplifies total output

column3: Bottom-panel rank sum; total rank investment shown in the Demon Hunter deck icon; reflects how many Demon Hunters are on the board and at what ranks — directly correlates to mark accumulation rate
column8: Sum of merge ranks across all Demon Hunter copies on board (e.g. 3x rank 3 = 9; 5x rank 1 = 5); higher total = more Hunters actively gaining marks; marks accumulate per-tile so more Hunters = faster overall mark accumulation

column3: Bottom-panel rank sum; chain bonus maxes at 10 Engineers (T3 L) or 13+ Engineers (T3 R); rank sum approximates how many Engineers the player has built toward the chain threshold
column8: Sum of merge ranks across all Engineer copies on board; chain damage bonus scales with number of Engineers in chain — max bonus at 10 (T3 L) or 13+ (T3 R); higher rank sum = more Engineers on field = closer to chain cap

column3: Bottom-panel rank sum; Inquisitor count thresholds are 4+ for +20% damage / 7+ for +35% crit damage / 10+ for +10% crit chance (R T3 Unity); rank sum approximates Inquisitor count on field
column8: Sum of merge ranks across all Inquisitor copies on board; unit-count thresholds at 4 (damage bonus) / 7 (crit damage) / 10 (crit chance) via R T3 Unity; higher rank sum = more Inquisitors on field = closer to or beyond key thresholds

column3: Bottom-panel rank sum; Fury charges are individual to each Minotaur — more Minotaurs on board = more independent Fury accumulators reaching the 300-charge threshold faster
column8: Sum of merge ranks across all Minotaur copies on board; each Minotaur individually accumulates Fury charges from merges and rank increases; more Minotaurs = more simultaneous charge accumulators

column3: Bottom-panel rank sum; L branch orbs transfer to the intersection Monk on merge — more Monks at intersections = more efficient orb consolidation; T4 Nirvana requires Monks at intersections to benefit
column8: Sum of merge ranks across all Monk copies on board; higher total investment = more Monks on field enabling orb transfers at intersections and T4 critical damage bonuses; L branch especially benefits from multiple high-rank Monks at intersection tiles

column3: Bottom-panel rank sum; L branch trophy skulls boost damage for ALL Reapers on the field — more Reapers = more sources of instant kills = faster trophy accumulation and more units benefiting from the shared bonus
column8: Sum of merge ranks across all Reaper copies on board; L branch trophy skull bonus applies to all Reapers simultaneously; more Reapers = more instant-kill attempts per wave = faster trophy accumulation

column3: Bottom-panel rank sum; each charged Tesla gives +4% damage to ALL Teslas (T3 L High Voltage) — more Teslas = more charges possible = compounding damage bonus; Professor (R T1) scales by his merge rank
column8: Sum of merge ranks across all Tesla copies on board; each charged Tesla adds +4% to all Tesla damage; more Teslas on field = more simultaneous charges possible = higher total damage multiplier from T3 L High Voltage

column3: Bottom-panel rank sum; R branch leaf bonus applies to ALL Treants on the field — more rank-4+ Treants = more leaf counters running simultaneously and a higher shared damage multiplier
column8: Sum of merge ranks across all Treant copies on board; R branch: each leaf adds +1.5% to ALL Treants' damage so more Treants accumulating leaves = faster shared bonus growth; rank 4+ required for leaf mechanic to activate

column3: Bottom-panel rank sum; balance requires EQUAL numbers of each color — having the right rank sum on each side determines whether balance state triggers and how many particles the Mana Power-up yields
column8: Sum of merge ranks across all Twins copies on board (both colors combined); balance state requires equal unit counts of each color — rank sum indicates total investment and how many particles are generated per Mana Power-up during balance

column3: Bottom-panel rank sum; R T1 Power of the Leaders requires 3 Valkyries to form Leaders; T3 R Unity bonus activates at 5+ Valkyries on field; rank sum approximates the unit count
column8: Sum of merge ranks across all Valkyrie copies on board; unit-count thresholds at 3 (Leaders form in R branch) and 5 (T3 R Unity damage bonus activates); higher rank sum = more Valkyries on field = closer to or beyond key activation thresholds
